rulings.Case Title: JOHN HICKS et al VS. FRANK YUEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Mtion For Judgment On The Pleadings On Pltf'S Third Cause Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 16, 2010, line 2. CROSS COMPLAINANTS FRANK YUEN, MAE YUEN'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On Plaintiff's Third Cause Of Action is denied. Employee can seek concurrent remedies and complaint does not conclusively show that plaintiff is seeking compensation that can only be recovered before the appeals board. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LAU KWONG et al VS. JENNIFER SHUK-HAN KWOK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Jennifer Kwok And California Financial Mortgage Corporation'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 16, 2010, line 11. Defendants Jennifer Kwok And California Financial Mortgage Corporation's Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is overruled as to allegations for resulting trust and accounting in 3rd, 4th, and 8th causes of action. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to constructive trust allegations in 3rd, 4th, and 8th causes of action. If plaintiffs want to state a cause of action for constructive trust, they must plead facts showing that the property was acquired through a wrongful act, such as fraud or breach of a fiduciary duty. Civil Code section 2224. They also must plead specifically who committed this wrongful act. Demurrer overruled as to the 6th cause of action for financial elder abuse. =(302/CWW)
